report.summary: Cycle 8 standup (Mar 28 late night). BTC ~$66,194 (flat from v7, $66K support holding). ETH $1,985 (-$14, lost $2K again). F&G 12-13 (Extreme Fear, ~50 day streak — record territory). DELTA: Uncommitted files 333→344 (+11 from reports/pages). Published pages 590→592 (+2 promoted: Starknet + ETF In-Kind). build-1 shipped DePIN Ecosystem + Gas Fees guides. community-v8 drafted tweets #226-228 (crash narrative, liquidation thread, BTC dominance). eod-v7 confirmed 0 regressions, 2 queue items ready to promote. All 6 agents ran last hour. 37 total agent runs today. Deploy blocked 18th consecutive cycle.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$66,194 (flat from v7, +0.0%). $66K support holding but no meaningful bounce. Down 24.6% YTD, ~47.5% from Oct 2025 ATH ($126K). Iran geopolitical tensions + oil above $100 continue to suppress risk assets. Whale accumulation ongoing — 270K BTC, exchange reserves at 7-year low.

ETH: ~$1,985 (-$14 from v7's $1,999, -0.7%). Lost the $2K level again. MetaMask reports $2,177 but CoinDesk/Fortune/CoinGabbar converge around $1,976-$1,985. Down ~60% from Aug 2025 high ($4,953). ETH/BTC ratio still at multi-year lows ~0.030. SOL -4.1% today leading altcoin declines.

F&G INDEX: 12-13 (Extreme Fear). Sources: CoinMarketCap 12, BlockchainMagazine 12, SpotedCrypto 13. Streak now ~48-50 days — at or approaching all-time record (post-FTX Nov 2022). Total crypto market cap $2.37T, down $80B+ since Mar 24. $450M liquidated in last 24h, 122K traders wiped.

DELTA FROM CYCLE 7 (standup-v7): BTC flat at $66,194. ETH $1,999→$1,985 (-0.7%, lost $2K). F&G stable 12-13. Uncommitted files 333→344 (+11). Published pages 590→592 (+2 promoted). 1 new build cycle shipped 2 guides (DePIN + Gas Fees). 3 new tweets drafted (#226-228). 1 SVG social card (Crash Divergence). Newsletter v38 addendum added. No new commits. No new deploys.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE 8 OF MARCH 28. Seven full rotations (all 6 agents) completed + this standup = 37 total agent runs today. Breakdown: standup×8, build×5, publish×4, design×6, community×7 (note: community skipped v2 numbering), eod×7.

WHAT SHIPPED SINCE CYCLE 7: build-1 created 2 new learn guides — DePIN Ecosystem Guide 2026 (650+ projects, $9B market, Filecoin/Render/Helium/Akash) and Crypto Gas Fees & Transaction Costs Guide 2026 (EIP-1559, EIP-4844, L2 savings, 7-chain comparison). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. publish-v4 promoted 2 pages (Starknet Validity Rollup + ETF In-Kind Redemption). community-v8 drafted tweets #226-228 (crash narrative trending angle, $450M liquidation thread, BTC dominance 56% historical pattern) + Newsletter v38 addendum + SVG social card (Crash Divergence). eod-v7 confirmed 0 regressions, 146 TS errors (+1), 343 uncommitted files at that point, 2 queue items (DePIN + Gas Fees) now have page.tsx and are ready to promote.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (CRITICAL): (1) Deploy — 344 uncommitted files (+11 from v7), 18th cycle flagging P0. HEAD still at 21aaf5b (Mar 25). (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet-security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) 2 NEW queue items ready to promote (DePIN + Gas Fees). (4) ~103 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage). (5) 146 TS errors in 6 files (stable, non-blocking JSX syntax). (6) 0/6 API routes rate-limited.
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b (unchanged since Mar 25). 344 files pending (31 modified + 313 untracked). All changes additive — zero destructive modifications.

PUBLISHED PAGES: 592 slugs in config (+2 promoted this cycle). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 4 items (2 blocked, 2 ready to promote). Content velocity today: 16+ pages built across 5 build cycles. 228 tweets drafted cumulative. 38 newsletter versions + addendum. 24+ OG images created today.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 18TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 344 uncommitted files spanning 3+ days. Every page, OG image, schema fix, and metadata improvement is invisible to production. Google cannot index any of the 16+ pages built today. Time-sensitive content (Morgan Stanley MSBT, SEC commodity ruling, staking reclassification, Fear & Greed record streak) losing news cycle relevance. Jefe: one git commit + push unlocks everything. 5-minute action, highest possible leverage.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 2 READY QUEUE ITEMS + CAPITALIZE ON FEAR STREAK RECORD: DePIN Ecosystem and Crypto Gas Fees guides are built, QA'd, and ready — promote to PUBLISHED_PAGES next cycle. Meanwhile, F&G streak at ~50 days is at or breaking the all-time record. Our Fear & Greed Timeline page + 'Why Is Crypto Crashing' content (tweet #226) should be deployed ASAP to capture this narrative moment before it passes.

PRIORITY 3 — FIX REMAINING PUBLISH BLOCKERS + RATE LIMITING: 2 blocked queue items (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx) are quick fixes — 10 min each. 0/6 API routes have rate limiting — this is a production vulnerability carried since Day 1. Adding basic rate limiting (100-200 req/min) to prices, fear-greed, and trending routes would prevent abuse without affecting normal users.
